raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Twenty-six million women nationwide are already facing near-total abortion bans.",
    "The U.S. Supreme Court has abandoned its duty to ensure equal rights regarding abortion.",
    "Extremist laws from anti-choice states are endangering California and its providers.",
    "AB 1666 creates a strong legal shield to ensure abortion care remains legal in California.",
    "The right to an abortion is enshrined in California law.",
    "Laws like AB 1666 will be the primary bulwark to protect abortion rights if Roe v. Wade is overturned.",
    "AB 1666 is a key piece of a larger legal framework that positions California as a sanctuary state for abortion.",
    "California will soon be the closest state without an abortion ban for 1.4 million women."
  ]
}
